reasoning: Phase B Task B2 swaps the prior stub Claude integration in the Step 6 design ingest flow for a real adapter. New ClaudeDesignAdapter in @caia/design-ingest implements the existing DesignAdapter contract (validate / parse / refresh / capabilities) using @chiefaia/claude-spawner v0.x for the subprocess spawn and parseClaudeJsonEnvelope for the JSON envelope. Subscription-only: the spawner unconditionally scrubs ANTHROPIC_API_KEY + sibling vars; there is no API-key fallback. Server-side only: the new POST /api/wizard/design/ingest route composes the canonical backend wrapper chain (withTenantSearchPath → wizardWithRetry → withClaudeSpawnerSpan) around the adapter so retries publish to the progress channel and Tempo records semantic attributes consistent with the proposal-generate route. Failure paths: spawn ok=false → 503 (retry envelope classifies as transient and surfaces errorClass); JSON parse / schema validation failure → 422 with the DesignIngestErrorCode in the response body so the client error.tsx (B1) can render structured copy. The stub path (no WIZARD_DESIGN_LIVE) returns a deterministic memory response so the existing E2E suite keeps passing without burning Claude tokens. 15 adapter unit tests + 12 route unit tests = 27 new cases. The design-ingest package suite (68 cases) is green. Pre-existing develop failures (@chiefaia/tracing dist missing withClaudeSpawnerSpan because workspace:* + pnpm doesn't rebuild on every install + TS2352 in edge-bypass.test.ts) are unchanged.

reuseSearchResults.reason: Canonical extraction (D1 2026-05-15) of the spawn pattern. Subscription-only by construction. parseClaudeJsonEnvelope handles the --output-format=json envelope shape used by every CAIA Claude caller. Selecting any other route would duplicate the scrub + envelope logic for the seventh time (anti-pattern explicitly called out in spawn.ts's file-level comment).

reuseSearchResults.considered_for: retry/backoff wrapper for the LLM call
reuseSearchResults.reason: B7's canonical retry envelope. Auto-publishes attempt/retry/final events to the wizard progress channel so the UI can render retry state without each route plumbing it. The binding union does not yet include 'design.ingest' as a step — we tag 'proposal.generate' as a temporary bucket; widening the union is a follow-up minor PR per the route file comment.
B3's canonical Tempo wrapper. Threads the wizard span as parent of the spawner's claude.spawn span so W3C trace_id propagates end-to-end. Same shape every other wizard claude-using route uses.

reuseSearchResults.considered_for: Postgres schema pin for the live path
reuseSearchResults.reason: B4's canonical wrapper. Even though Ingestor persistence is deferred to Wave 2, wrapping early means the future persistence cycle lands without route churn.

reuseSearchResults.candidate: new sibling package design-ingest-adapter-claude (mirror of design-ingest-adapter-cd-zip)
reuseSearchResults.considered_for: where to put the Claude adapter
reuseSearchResults.reason: The CD ZIP adapter lives in a sibling package because its 7-stage pipeline depends on JSX parsing libraries that @caia/design-ingest does not need. The Claude adapter only depends on @chiefaia/claude-spawner — already a small surface — and inlining keeps the export surface tighter for consumers who want both the framework and the canonical adapter. The README description was updated to reflect that the package now hosts one LLM-using adapter.

Both would violate the spawn-pattern consolidation rule (spawn.ts file-level comment) and the subscription-only constraint (feedback_no_api_key_billing.md). @chiefaia/claude-spawner is the only sanctioned path.

reuseSearchResults.considered_for: ux_uploads insert + snapshot capture on the live path
reuseSearchResults.reason: Persistence requires the per-tenant ux_uploads schema migration to have run for every tenant. That scaffolding lands in a separate PR. The V1 wizard surface returns the parsed RenderableDesign so the client can advance; the route's file-level comment documents the deferral.

modifications: Added seven B2-specific DesignIngestErrorCode values to the union (claude_design_requires_remote_input, claude_design_prompt_required, claude_design_version_id_required, claude_spawn_failed, claude_envelope_invalid, claude_design_json_parse_failed, claude_design_schema_invalid). All emitted by ClaudeDesignAdapter with structured context. This widens the framework's public error vocabulary, which the route's existing 422/503 branching reads off.

Source-count test (schema.test.ts) updated from 'lists all 9 spec sources' → 'lists all 10 spec sources (9 external + claude-design from B2)' to reflect the addition of 'claude-design' to SOURCE_NAMES. This is the only existing test the diff modifies.
@caia/design-ingest package description updated — the prior README claim 'No LLM calls' no longer holds. The adapter is server-side-only and subscription-only, both noted in the new description.

wizardWithRetry binding step union does not yet include 'design.ingest' — the route temporarily tags 'proposal.generate' so the progress channel still surfaces this route's retries. A follow-up minor PR will widen the union. Documented inline in the route file comment.

evidence.typecheckDelta: no new TS errors in B2 files; pre-existing tracing-dist withClaudeSpawnerSpan resolution + TS2352 in edge-bypass.test.ts unchanged
